title: feat: weekly model-changes report -> news branch + Discord
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Weekly Model Rollcall
gist.blurb: Added an automated weekly report to track new and updated models across the platform, keeping our Discord community in the loop.
gist.summary: Implemented a weekly cron job that snapshots model endpoints, diffs changes, and posts an AI-generated summary to Discord.
gist.impact: The community will now receive automated weekly updates on Discord about any new, updated, or removed models.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a reporter or taking attendance of various models, holding a clipboard. A robot companion helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny press hat and holding a clipboard, taking attendance of glowing model orbs on a shelf. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a camera. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny press hat and holding a clipboard, taking attendance of glowing model orbs on a shelf.
